name: ASUS PRIME B760-PLUS ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Supports DDR5-7200+(OC) - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 3.0 x1 - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen2x2 Type-C - DisplayPort 1.4 - VGA - HDMI 2.1 - Realtek 2.5Gb LAN - Thunderbolt (USB4) Header
